title: Serve Correct Image Candidates and Art Direction
summary: Build and verify responsive images in resource location imagery delivery audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain responsive images from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply responsive images without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

options.text: Resource location imagery delivery audit case 1: setting max-width one hundred percent prevents an oversized image download.

Resource location imagery delivery audit case 1: combine intrinsic dimensions, fluid rendering, truthful sizes, candidate sources, and purpose-driven alternative text; use picture only when format or composition changes.
Resource location imagery delivery audit case 1: put the largest source first and rely on CSS to reduce its network cost.

steps.title: 02 · Read the resource location imagery delivery audit case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 2: Which claim preserves responsive images when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: resource location imagery delivery audit.
steps.why: Serve Correct Image Candidates and Art Direction makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 2 in resource location imagery delivery audit.

content.text: Fluid CSS prevents rendered overflow, but responsive image markup controls which bytes the browser selects. Width descriptors plus an accurate sizes condition let the browser choose among srcset candidates. Picture supports format alternatives and art direction when the composition must change. Intrinsic width and height reserve aspect ratio and useful alt text follows the image purpose. Apply it to resource location imagery delivery audit.
